profile.name: Vedant Dave
profile.tagline: Full-Stack Engineer. Building things that scale.
profile.bio: Software Engineering student at Carleton University (graduating 2027), building full-stack products end-to-end — from PostgreSQL schemas to React Native screens. Previously a Student Developer at the Bank of Canada shipping Python microservices for internal data pipelines, and a Technical Analyst at the City of Brampton optimizing Azure cloud infrastructure. Currently shipping TandemPay, a fintech platform with a double-entry ledger, Stripe Connect, and Plaid OAuth; and NXTATH, an athlete engagement platform in active development. Microsoft Azure certified (AZ-900). Co-President, Hindu Student Society at Carleton.

experience.summary: Built and scaled Python microservices and REST APIs supporting internal data pipelines and analytics workflows at Canada's central bank.
highlights: Built and scaled Python-based microservices and REST APIs supporting internal data pipelines and analytics workflows
Improved data pipeline reliability by implementing validation logic, reducing manual data review effort by 30%
Deployed services using Docker and CI/CD pipelines ensuring consistent, reproducible releases

experience.summary: Optimized Azure cloud infrastructure and resolved high-impact technical issues across city-wide systems serving thousands of users.
highlights: Optimized cloud infrastructure using Azure, improving overall system performance by 15%
Resolved high-impact technical issues across city-wide systems, maintaining uptime for critical services
Supported deployment of scalable applications serving 3,000+ users

experience.summary: Provided hands-on hardware and software support for 50+ customers daily as part of Apple's retail technical support team.
highlights: Diagnosed and resolved hardware and software issues for 50+ customers daily, translating complex problems into actionable solutions
Provided technical guidance on Apple ecosystem products in a fast-paced, high-volume environment

projects.title: TandemPay
projects.subtitle: Financial state management for groups
projects.description: Full-stack fintech monorepo for multi-user financial state management. Features a double-entry ledger for balance correctness, Stripe Connect with webhook-based reconciliation, Plaid OAuth for bank linking, and a greedy debt-simplification algorithm that minimizes transactions across a group.
highlights: Double-entry ledger — guarantees financial correctness, balance consistency, and conservation of money
Idempotent payment operations with row-level locking (SELECT FOR UPDATE) — eliminates race conditions
Greedy debt-simplification algorithm — minimizes transaction count for group settlement
50+ documented REST API endpoints across groups, expenses, settlements, and payments

projects.title: NXTATH
projects.subtitle: Athlete engagement platform
projects.description: Full-stack athlete engagement platform built with React and React Native. MVP in active development.
